name: INTUIT INC.
summary: Intuit is a global financial technology platform serving approximately 100 million consumers, small and mid-market businesses, and accountants worldwide. Its key products include TurboTax (tax preparation), Credit Karma (personal finance), QuickBooks (business financial management), Mailchimp (marketing automation), and Intuit Enterprise Suite (mid-market business management). The company leverages AI and human intelligence to deliver financial, tax, payroll, payments, and marketing services across four segments: Global Business Solutions, Consumer, Credit Karma, and ProTax.

products.name: TurboTax
products.description: Do-it-yourself and assisted income tax preparation sold in the U.S. and Canada.

products.name: Credit Karma
products.description: Personal finance platform offering credit monitoring, loan recommendations, savings/checking accounts, and credit building tools.

products.name: QuickBooks
products.description: All-in-one business platform for financial management, payroll, payments, and bill pay for small and mid-market businesses.

products.name: Mailchimp
products.description: Marketing automation and customer relationship management tools for businesses.

products.name: Intuit Enterprise Suite
products.description: Configurable, AI-powered multi-entity financial management solution for more complex mid-market businesses.

products.name: Lacerte
products.description: Professional tax software for accountants in the U.S.

products.name: ProSeries
products.description: Professional tax software for accountants in the U.S.

products.name: ProConnect Tax Online
products.description: Online professional tax product for accountants in the U.S.

products.name: ProFile
products.description: Professional tax product for accountants in Canada.

products.name: ProTax Online
products.description: Online professional tax product for accountants in Canada.

products.name: GenOS
products.description: Intuit's proprietary Generative AI Operating System built for internal developers to fuel AI innovation.

partnerships.description: Provides checking and savings accounts to Credit Karma and QuickBooks customers through an FDIC-member bank partner.
